description: This file controls the starting stats for each of the classes. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: class
columns.description: The name of the character class (this cannot be changed).

columns.name: str
columns.description: Starting amount of the Strength attribute.

columns.name: dex
columns.description: Starting amount of the Dexterity attribute.

columns.name: int
columns.description: Starting amount of the Energy attribute.

columns.name: vit
columns.description: Starting amount of the Vitality attribute.

columns.name: stamina
columns.description: Starting amount of Stamina.

columns.name: hpadd
columns.description: Bonus starting Life value (This value gets added with the .vit field value to determine the overall starting amount of Life).

columns.name: ManaRegen
columns.description: Number of seconds to regain max Mana (If this equals 0 then it will default to 300 seconds).

columns.name: ToHitFactor
columns.description: Starting amount of Attack Rating.

columns.name: WalkVelocity
columns.description: Base Walk movement speed.

columns.name: RunVelocity
columns.description: Base Run movement speed.

columns.name: RunDrain
columns.description: Rate at which Stamina is lost while running.

columns.name: LifePerLevel
columns.description: Amount of Life added for each level gained (Calculated in fourths and is divided by 256).

columns.name: StaminaPerLevel
columns.description: Amount of Stamina added for each level gained (Calculated in fourths and is divided by 256).

columns.name: ManaPerLevel
columns.description: Amount of Mana added for each level gained (Calculated in fourths and is divided by 256).

columns.name: LifePerVitality
columns.description: Amount of Life added for each point in Vitality (Calculated in fourths and is divided by 256).

columns.name: StaminaPerVitality
columns.description: Amount of Stamina added for each point in Vitality (Calculated in fourths and is divided by 256).

columns.name: ManaPerMagic
columns.description: Amount of Mana added for each point in Energy (Calculated in fourths and is divided by 256).

columns.name: StatPerLevel
columns.description: Amount of Attribute stat points earned for each level gained.

columns.name: SkillsPerLevel
columns.description: Amount of Skill points earned for each level gained.

columns.name: LightRadius
columns.description: Baseline radius size of the character's Light Radius.

columns.name: BlockFactor
columns.description: Baseline percent chance for Blocking.

columns.name: MinimumCastingDelay
columns.description: Minimum casting delay on all Skills after using a Skill with a skills.localdelay or skills.globaldelay (Calculated in Frames, where 25 Frames = 1 Second).

columns.name: StartSkill
columns.description: Controls what skill will be added by default to the character's starting weapon and will be slotted in the Right Skill selection.

columns.name: Skill 1
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 2
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 3
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 4
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 5
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 6
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 7
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 8
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 9
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: Skill 10
columns.description: Skill that the character starts with and will always have available.

columns.name: StrAllSkills
columns.description: String key for displaying the item modifier bonus to all skills for the class (Ex: "+1 to Barbarian Skill Levels").

columns.name: StrSkillTab1
columns.description: String key for displaying the item modifier bonus to all skills for the class's skill tabs (Ex: Tab 1 is "+1 to Warcries", tab 2 is "+1 to Combat Skills", tab 3 is "+1 to Masteries").

columns.name: StrSkillTab2
columns.description: String key for displaying the item modifier bonus to all skills for the class's skill tabs (Ex: Tab 1 is "+1 to Warcries", tab 2 is "+1 to Combat Skills", tab 3 is "+1 to Masteries").

columns.name: StrSkillTab3
columns.description: String key for displaying the item modifier bonus to all skills for the class's skill tabs (Ex: Tab 1 is "+1 to Warcries", tab 2 is "+1 to Combat Skills", tab 3 is "+1 to Masteries").

columns.name: StrClassOnly
columns.description: String key for displaying on item modifier exclusive to the class or for class specific items (Ex: "Barbarian only").

columns.name: HealthPotionPercent
columns.description: This scales the amount of Life that a Healing potion will restore based on the class.

columns.name: ManaPotionPercent
columns.description: This scales the amount of Mana that a Mana potion will restore based on the class.

columns.name: baseWClass
columns.description: Base weapon class that the character will use by default when no weapon is equipped. Defaults to "hth". Corresponds to enums.EWEAPONCLASS.

columns.name: item1
columns.description: Item code that the character starts with.

columns.name: item1loc
columns.description: Location where the related item will be placed in the character's inventory.

columns.name: item1count
columns.description: The amount of the related item that the character starts with.

columns.name: item1quality
columns.description: Controls the quality level of the related item. Corresponds to enums.EITEMMODTYPE.

columns.name: TwoHandedOffHandRestrictItemType
columns.description: Optional item type to restrict off-hand item to when a two-handed weapon is currently equipped.

columns.name: TwoHandedDamageAsOneHanded
columns.description: If greater than 0, use one-handed damage values for two-handed equipped weapons.
